title: psychotria subsessiliflora var. carinata
intro: Psychotria subsessiliflora var. carinata, also known as a species of plant within the Rubiaceae family, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Psychotria subsessiliflora var. carinata include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as providing relief from various types of pain and infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
